title: Qubit Modalities: A Comprehensive Overview
description: Compare and contrast the major qubit technologies including superconducting, trapped ion, photonic, neutral atom, and emerging modalities. Understand the fundamental physics, advantages, and limitations of each approach.
learningObjectives: Describe the fundamental physics behind each major qubit modality
Compare coherence times, gate speeds, and error rates across platforms
Analyze the strengths and weaknesses of each technology for different applications
Evaluate the maturity level and commercial readiness of each approach
Understand the key engineering challenges specific to each modality
